name: Corn and Goat Cheese Flan
recipeIngredient: 8 ears corn, kernels cut (to make 4 cups)
salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
Cayenne or pure ground NM-style chile - optional
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 325°F.
2. Butter six small soufflé dishes; set aside.
3. Put kernels in a food processor and puree.
4. Crumble cheese over top and puree again.
5. Add eggs one at a time with the machine running.
6. Add seasonings and puree again.
7. Scoop mixture into prepared soufflé dishes and bake 20 - 30 minutes or until the center is set.
